notes: v347 — SPEED FIX FOR SLOW / FREEZING LOADS. If the app was freezing or crawling while it loaded (especially on a phone, or with a large saved market), this addresses it. The cause was one step that recalculated volume and streaks for your WHOLE saved market in a single locked burst — the screen couldn't move until it finished. That step now works in small pieces so the app stays responsive while it loads, and it creates far less work for your device's memory (which was causing stutters of its own). The signal-preparation stage was also refreshing the top counters on every single batch; it now does that a bit less often (they still fill in live as it loads). Nothing about your numbers or results changes — the app just no longer freezes to do the work. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to load v347. ALSO RECENT — v346 — the ⬆ Export data button is now in both Simple and Advanced views. v344 — orders placed before the ASX opens (before 10am Sydney) now fill the same day if the price point is hit. v343 — Top 20 is a single-column ladder. v341 — RSI upgraded to Wilder's standard. (Older notes live in the Owner's Manual changelog.)
